name: agentic-engineering-workflow
description: Pixel Perfect Apps' open-source workflow plugins — turn your AI coding agent into a Director of Engineering with sprint cadence, multi-agent review triad, ADR discipline, and one-keystroke bug/idea capture. Distributed via Claude Code marketplace; agent-agnostic skill content also installable manually for Codex and others.

plugins.name: agentic-engineering-workflow
plugins.description: Scaffold an agent-driven team workflow into any workspace. Installs /defect + /idea slash commands, an AGENTS.md guide, ADR structure, tracker projects + labels, and the bootstrap skill that wires it all together. Agent-agnostic skill content works with Claude Code, Codex, and any agent that reads SKILL.md-style instructions.
